inputs.label: Free-stream Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The velocity of the fluid far from the boundary.

inputs.label: Kinematic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Kinematic viscosity of the fluid (ν = μ/ρ).

inputs.label: Distance from Leading Edge
inputs.businessContext: Distance along the surface from the leading edge.

inputs.label: Flow Regime (0=Laminar, 1=Turbulent)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 for laminar boundary layer, 1 for turbulent (using 1/7th power law).

formulas.delta: flowRegime === 0 ? 5.0 * distance / Math.sqrt(velocity * distance / kinematicViscosity) : 0.37 * distance / Math.pow(velocity * distance / kinematicViscosity, 0.2)
formulas.cf: flowRegime === 0 ? 0.664 / Math.sqrt(velocity * distance / kinematicViscosity) : 0.0592 / Math.pow(velocity * distance / kinematicViscosity, 0.2)
